apps.name: Uboat Attack
apps.description:
"Dive into the deep sea with the ww2 naval wargame “Uboat game - Submarine torpedo attack” Be captain of a real submarine in tactical combat against ships from all over the water.

Get the best tactical weapons, suitable for different marine battles and become a champion navy fighter of underwater simulator.

Sink enemies’ armadas in Survival. Show honor in navy world and fight through the ranks to admiral of u-boat! Explore underwater areas of arctic wastelands, canyons, abyss, sunken temples to get tactical advantage in war and prepare an ambush.

Warfare in marine events, tactical missions and navy challenges to get resources in the game. Dominate the sea!


Dozens of real ships
Track warships and make your best shot. 

Realistic damage
Intense combat might cause fire events, propeller failure and other damages. Choose your tactics by launching torpedoes.

Breathtaking graphics and locations
Enjoy every second in the game with realistic graphics, stunning visual, detailed U-Boats, warships and locations! You can change graphic settings to improve visuals or performance.

Comfortable controls
Intuitive controls, swipe left or right to navigate and zoom in or zoom out to see the best composition of blasts. But you will need skills to become a champion of the navy simulator!

Ready to fight in the naval warfare simulator? Launch the game and start to shoot and sink enemies

Not sure what wargame to play? Choose “Uboat game - Submarine torpedo attack” 

Join real-time navy FREE wargame deep in the sea, armada is awaiting your commands, destroy enemy fighters with deadly torpedoes in intense and realistic 3D blitz shooter. Unique warship gameplay!

Warfare simulator is finally here! Action packed as any shooter. It offers both first person ship shooter simulator and deep strategic decisions"
apps.subtitle: Submarine torpedo attack game

Each level will always offer something new and unexpected. Feel the need to win? 

You’ll get money, fame, satisfaction and a whole lot more in this addictive game that’s as intuitive as it is rewarding.

-Lots of games: The games you will play will be different each level

-Huge payouts: You can bet what you earn so it is easy to multiply your money

-Shop as you wish: Bet right and become a millionaire. Buy awesome stuff and do not afraid to be a show off. You can't take it to the grave

Start small with regular gas and diesel, then progress through exciting levels by adopting cleaner and greener energy sources. From electricity to nuclear power, make eco-friendly choices and shape the future of energy in your town.

Embark on exciting quests to earn rewards, unlock new features, and expand your gas empire. Whether it's a delivery challenge or a special event, rise to the occasion and prove you have what it takes to be the gas tycoon.

apps.name: Flying Cut
apps.description:
Welcome to the ultimate slicing experience! Get ready for an adrenaline-pumping adventure where your precision and skill will be put to the test. In this addictive mobile game, your objective is simple yet immensely satisfying: cut through a myriad of obstacles and objects with finesse and style.

Equipped with a collection of razor-sharp katanas, you'll embark on a journey filled with thrilling challenges. But there's a twist - you can stack your katanas and use them to glide through the air, reaching your target with unparalleled grace. Strategize your approach, time your cuts perfectly, and watch as the objects shatter into a spectacular explosion of fragments.

Immerse yourself in a captivating world of visual delight, as each slice and dice is accompanied by stunning visuals and immersive sound effects. The more precise your cuts, the more points you'll earn, unlocking exciting new levels and unlocking a variety of powerful katanas along the way.

With intuitive controls and an addictive gameplay loop, this game will keep you coming back for more. Challenge yourself to achieve the highest score, compete with friends, and become the ultimate slicing master. Are you ready to experience the sheer satisfaction of slicing through obstacles with unmatched precision? Get ready to embark on an exhilarating slicing frenzy today!

apps.name: Sew 3D
apps.description: Welcome to the world of simple sewing and full of delight. All you need is to relax and enjoy sewing different products. With each level, your logic and skills will improve. You have absolute freedom of action, do what you want and earn money! Upgrade your skills and become a real professional! Some levels are very difficult! Can you pass them all?
apps.subtitle: Sew. Fix. Relax.
apps.promo_text: Do you want to learn how to sew in 5 seconds?

apps.name: Double Money
apps.description:
Get your net worth to the moon! 
First, play rock-paper-scissors to decide who goes first, then grow your money stack by picking up the best cards, make sure you have more money than your opponent.
Simply tap a card to use it!
Don't forget about red cards, you can reduce your opponent stack by using them, but so can do your opponent so be careful.

apps.name: Draw & Break It!
apps.description:
Draw, race and win! Pass obstacles and don't break your car before finishing race!
Unleash your creativity and build your own wild ride! Draw your vehicle by connecting dots using limited ink, then race against opponents through crazy obstacle tracks. Use your imagination to design a car that can survive the bumps, jumps, and wild physics of the race. But beware — one wrong move, and your car might fall apart!

Game Features:

Draw your own custom cars

Race on physics-based tracks filled with challenges

Outsmart opponents and finish first

Limited ink means smarter drawing = better results

Your car breaks based on speed and design—stay in control!

Unlock new levels and wacky shape challenges

Can your design handle the chaos? Each race is a test of your engineering and drawing skills. Build smarter, race faster, and don’t fall apart before the finish line!

Get ready for the ultimate draw race game where your imagination fuels your speed! In this car drawing game, you sketch your own vehicle with limited ink and then enter a thrilling physics racing challenge. It's not just about speed—it's about how well your creation survives the track.

Design your car in this ink racing game, then draw and drive through wild terrains packed with traps, ramps, and surprises. It’s a fun obstacle game that puts your design and driving skills to the test. Each level is a new racing challenge—will your wheels stay on, or will it all fall apart in a spectacular physics car crash?

Build smarter, race faster, and become the ultimate car builder in this crazy racing game. Whether you're into sketch race chaos or crafting the perfect draw car 3D machine, this is the game for you. Perfect for fans of draw runner chaos and car break simulator action!
apps.subtitle: Draw, race and win!
apps.promo_text: Draw your own car, race through wild tracks, and avoid crashing! Use limited ink, beat opponents, and survive the chaos in this epic physics challenge!

apps.name: Puff Up
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
"Do you like bubble shooter, 2048 and match 3 puzzle games? YES, Puff up is made for you! Inflate balloons, shoot them and avoid spikes or they will pop! Use your brain to win the game and break the chains!

How to play this balloon puzzle game?
1) Tap and hold to grow balloons and make them as big as possible. No need to match balloons by number like for 2048 games, it’s way easier.
2) Perfectly time the release of your balloon and avoid obstacles, or your ballooons will pop!
3) No brain, no game! Play smart to reach the correct number and break the chain!

Can you solve all the puzzles?
We have created numerous levels and obstacles to make the game more fun, and to let you rise up to the challenge. If you're too quick, you may be hit by spikes, lasers and other obstacles. Beware and remember that it's a puzzle game!

Enjoy mini games
We have built 13 bonus mini games that will make you relax or rise to the challenge!

Make your balloons unique!
Unlock numerous skins in the game by solving puzzles and winning games: shapes and colour effects are waiting for you! Can you collect em all?

Challenge your friends
Can you reach the highest score and finish the game? Check the leaderboard and beat your friends score!"

Terms & Conditions : https://www.voodoo.io/terms/
Privacy Policy : https://www.voodoo.io/privacy/
apps.subtitle: 2048 brain game to relax

apps.name: Block Jam - 3D Block Puzzle
apps.description:
Block Jam 3D – Relaxing Match-3 Puzzle Fun!

Block Jam is a free match-3 puzzle game with a unique twist: clever mechanics, fun chaos, and charming characters. Whether you're playing a quick round or clearing your tray like a pro, there’s always something to figure out — and it all works offline, too! Use clever moves and powerful boosters to outsmart the blockie mayhem!

How to Jam
• Match-3 with a twist – Cozy tile-matching with clever strategy!
• Tray-based gameplay – Plan your moves, keep your tray tidy, avoid a blockie jam!
• Fun mechanics – Glue, pipes, barrels, and other nonsense to outsmart!
• Handy boosters – Undo, Step Out, Shuffle, Magnet — pick your puzzle superpower!
• Offline-ready – Play anytime, even with no connection!

The Big Picture
• Leagues – Compete in weekly leaderboards and rise through 6 skill tiers!
• Season Pass – Monthly themes (pirates! samurais! dinos!) with both free and premium rewards — unlock hats, boosters, coins, and more!
• Fun Worlds – Complete levels to build out colorful themed dioramas, one quirky building at a time. Finish a world and travel to the next!
• Missions – Complete fun tasks back-to-back — there's always another challenge!
• Collections – Fill out themed card albums to learn more about your blockies (and their favorite snacks)!

Live Ops
Log in, dive in, mix it up — events rotate constantly, with exciting limited-time competitions and rewards!
• Gem Hunt – Dig through tombs to uncover sparkling gems and ancient treasure. One pickaxe at a time.
• Pastry Partners – Team up with strangers to bake delicious cakes. Co-op chaos meets sweet rewards. 
• Bomb Bridge – Face off in real-time block battles. The bomb walks toward whoever's slacking. Good luck!
…And more events pop up every day — there’s always something going on!


Embark on a puzzle journey like no other. Download Block Jam 3D today and dive into a world of strategic matching, tile puzzles, and daily blockie madness. 
Don’t miss out — it’s time to jam!
apps.subtitle: Chill Cute Offline Puzzle Game

apps.name: Bubble Fall 3D
apps.description:
Join the bubble-popping fun in Bubble Fall 3D! This exciting puzzle game challenges you to match colored bubbles and create cascading chain reactions. Whether you're looking for a fun way to pass the time or a challenging new game to play, Bubble Fall 3D - Fun & Addictive Puzzle Game is the perfect choice. With its simple controls and addictive gameplay, this game is easy to pick up and play, but it's also challenging enough to keep you coming back for more.

In Bubble Fall 3D, your goal is to match bubbles of the same color to create chain reactions. The more bubbles you match, the more points you'll earn, and the more challenging the levels will become. With each successful match, you'll watch as the bubbles fall and disappear, and you'll feel a sense of satisfaction as your score climbs higher and higher.

The controls in Bubble Fall 3D - Fun & Addictive Puzzle Game are simple and intuitive, so you'll be able to start playing right away. All you need to do is aim and shoot, and you'll be on your way to creating chain reactions and earning points. The game is easy to play, but it's also challenging enough to keep you coming back for more.

Whether you're a fan of puzzle games or simply love playing games that are both fun and challenging, Bubble Fall 3D is the perfect choice. This game is incredibly addictive, and once you start playing, you won't be able to put it down. With its simple controls, challenging levels, and exciting gameplay, Bubble Fall 3D - Fun & Addictive Puzzle Game is a game that's sure to provide hours of entertainment.

So why wait? Download Bubble Fall 3D - Fun & Addictive Puzzle Game now and start your bubble-popping journey! With its fun, addictive gameplay and challenging levels, this game is sure to provide hours of entertainment. Whether you're looking to pass the time or you're looking for a new and exciting game to play, Bubble Fall 3D is the perfect choice. So what are you waiting for? Download it now and start matching bubbles today!
apps.subtitle: Fun & Addictive Puzzle Game

apps.name: Drone Strike Military War 3D
apps.description:
Drone Strike Military War 3D is full of action and combat warfare game that takes you right into the middle of battle.

You are in command of aerial strikes to fire rockets at the enemy and slay them through drones with a helicopter or gunship view. You have to aim your target to perfection and bombard enemy targets and their base. From the first strike to the last, you need to overcome enemy tanks in the battle while being in flight from the sky. 

This game takes you into a realistic aerial military warfare action environment with jets flying around you with their heavy jet sounds and fire sounds. You have to focus on your aim and avoid all distractions to fulfill your battle mission. 

Dive into contemporary warfare with drone strikes and the air force mission. You’ll be provided with weapons like rockets. You’ll need to aim your rockets at enemy tanks and fire rockets to destroy them and wreck them completely in 3D. 

A thrilling experience with jaw dropping suspense causing destruction in the enemy lines while in heavy combat and aerial warfare. Experience modern warfare with drones in flight and aerial military shooting to slay and destroy the base and tanks of the enemy. 

●	Perfect your aim 
●	Realistic Drone Simulator from the sky
●	Fire at the enemy while being in flight
●	Helicopter or gunship view of enemy tanks and their base
●	Warfare filled with action and combat
●	Experience the world of the contemporary air force and aerial military
●	Slay the enemy from a helicopter or in a gunship view
●	Battle like never before
●	Complete mission tasks in combat
●	Realistic warfare environment with jets flying and shooting sounds
●	3D Graphics aerial view
apps.subtitle: Aim and attack from the air!

TERMS OF SERVICE - PURCHASE


Voodoo offers to each of its account holder (the “Account Holder”) the possibility to select a weekly subscription (the “Subscription”) for a weekly price of 6.99 USD (the “Price”) for the purpose of accessing specific services expressly made available by Voodoo for use (the “Subscribed Services”).

Scope of the Subscription

The Subscribed Services will allow the Account Holder to unlock his chests faster, get 30 daily gems, free boosters and no more interstitial ads (some rewarded ads can still be displayed).

The Account Holder agrees that the Price with respect to the Subscribed Services is final and will not be subject to refund.

Purchases by Account Holders outside the U.S.A

The Price is labelled in US Dollars. If the Account Holder resides outside the U.S.A, and wishes to download the Subscription, the Price will be subject to certain variation including additional charges for conversion of the currency.

In addition, Voodoo reserves the right at any time to change and update the Price and inventory of the Subscribed Services available.

Termination of the Subscription

Except as provided below regarding renewal of the Subscription, Voodoo may cancel, suspend or terminate the access by the Account Holder of the Subscribed Services if:

the Account Holder fails to comply with the terms ;
Voodoo suspects any unlawful activity associated with the Account Holder; and
Voodoo suspects certain event of fraud or misuse.

The Subscription is subject to automatic renewal unless the Account Holder withdraws from the Subscription 24-hours before the end of the current week corresponding to the subscription period. If the Account Holder does not withdraw, he will be charged for the following Subscription period.

The Account Holder may manage directly the automatic renewal by using the functionality provided for in the settings of its iTunes Account.

When the Account Holder’s Free Trial Period or the subscription period expires, and provided that he has withdrawn from the Subscription as described above, his personal account will be closed.

The Account Holder acknowledges that Voodoo is not required to provide a refund in the event that there remains any amount in his account. Voodoo will not grant any compensation for unused currency.

apps.name: Dolls Stack: Match & Stack!
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
Welcome to Dolls Stack, the ultimate match 3 game that combines classic puzzle gameplay with the charm of Russian nesting dolls in a new way! Dive into a world of colorful dolls and exciting challenges as you stack and match your way to victory!


- Match & Merge: Combine three dolls of the same size and color to create the next-sized doll. Keep stacking to reveal surprises! Matching and merging in one game! 

- Stunning Visuals: Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of Russian dolls with beautifully designed graphics and charming animations.

- Challenging Puzzles: Test your matching skills with a variety of challenging puzzles and brain-teasing levels. Can you solve them all?

- Power-Ups Galore: Boost your gameplay with exciting power-ups and special abilities. Crush obstacles and conquer levels with ease!

- Social Connection: Connect with friends and compete on leaderboards. Show off your stacking skills and see who can reach the top!

- Relaxing Music & Sounds: Enjoy a soothing experience with satisfying sounds and relaxing music.

Dolls Stack is the perfect blend of strategy, fun, and creativity. Download now and discover the joy of stacking Russian dolls in this addictive match-3 puzzle game!

Take powerful weapons and make your way through a huge number of enemies in order to get to the boss and eliminate him. Don't forget to pick up useful improvements during the mission to make it easier to complete the tasks at hand.

A huge number of weapons will give you an unforgettable shooting experience! You have access to a wide variety of weapons, up to exotic rocket launchers and flamethrowers! A lot of fun is guaranteed. Each weapon is unique and has its own distinctive abilities. In addition to weapons, you have access to a huge amount of different equipment! Like weapons, each outfit gives you unique abilities that will make the gameplay as diverse as possible and help you defeat an army of enemies.

The maximum convenient one-finger control allows you to deeply immerse yourself in the game process. Focus on shooting, use the environment to dodge enemy bullets, think through the tactics of movement, select the necessary equipment to fulfill the tasks!

If you are ready to dive into the world of a unique shooter, Rage Swarm is your way to victory.

apps.name: Airborne Attack
advisories: Infrequent/Mild Alcohol, Tobacco, or Drug Use or References
apps.description:
Prepare to take command of an advanced air defense system in Airborne Attack, the ultimate mobile game for adrenaline-seeking players! Engage in intense battles as you defend against relentless aerial attacks and experience the thrill of controlling a powerful Close-In Weapon System (CIWS) to protect your base from enemy threats. 

Key Features:

1. Master the Art of Air Defense: Become an expert in air defense tactics as you take control of a cutting-edge CIWS. Track, target, and engage enemy aircraft with precision and lightning-fast reflexes. Protect your base and repel wave after wave of enemy attacks.

2. Realistic CIWS Simulation: Experience the authentic feel of operating a CIWS through realistic controls and immersive graphics. Marvel at the intricate details of the weapon system and feel the power of its rapid-fire Gatling gun as you engage multiple targets simultaneously.

3. Challenging Missions: Put your air defense skills to the test with a variety of challenging missions. Take part in intense campaigns, defend strategic locations, and thwart enemy offensives. Adapt your strategy to changing scenarios and unlock new missions as you progress.

4. Upgrade and Customize: Enhance your CIWS and base defenses with upgrades and customization options. Unlock new weapon systems, improve firing speed, increase accuracy, and strengthen your base's resilience against enemy attacks. Customize your CIWS appearance with various skins and decals.

5. Multiplayer Battles: Team up with friends or compete against players from around the world in thrilling multiplayer battles. Join forces to protect each other's bases or engage in fierce PvP battles to prove your air defense supremacy. Earn rewards and climb the global leaderboards.

6. Strategic Decision-Making: Analyze incoming threats, prioritize targets, and make split-second decisions to maximize your defense capabilities. Manage your resources efficiently and deploy defensive strategies to outsmart enemy tactics. Every decision can mean the difference between victory and defeat.

7. Stunning Visuals and Sound: Immerse yourself in a visually stunning world with high-quality graphics and dynamic effects. From the explosive destruction of enemy aircraft to the whirring of the CIWS Gatling gun, every moment is brought to life with captivating sound design.

Ready to defend your base from airborne threats? Download Airborne Attack now and embark on a thrilling air defense journey that will put your skills to the ultimate test!
apps.subtitle: Best Air Defense Game
